name: Brett
description: Brett is a meme project on the Ethereum network. $BRETT follows the hugely popular contract address trend with his friends Pepe, Andy, and Landwolf. These characters all feature in the playful and imaginative world of 'Boysclub' by Matt Furie. Their contract addresses all start in 0x69, 0x68, 0x67 and 0x66 respectively. This token has no intrinsic value, utility, or expectation of financial return, and it is intended solely for entertainment purposes.
